details: The agent correctly retrieved all required information using appropriate tool calls. It identified the correct title 'Gateway: harden OpenResponses file-context escaping', correctly attributed authorship to joshavant, accurately counted CI results (19 success, 7 skipped, 4 failures from the 30 returned checks out of 41 total), named all 4 failing checks, and correctly summarized the single Greptile bot comment with its 5/5 confidence rating. When initial tool calls with invalid methods failed, the agent recovered by checking the schema and using the correct method names. The final answer was complete and accurate.
